title: YellowKnife
body: # YellowKnife **YellowKnife** is an in-game __offline__ account switcher for Minecraft, allowing you to quickly switch between accounts __without__ restarting the game. ## Features - Seamless account switching **while** in-game. - **Simple**, **clean** user interface. - Account management (**add**, **switch**, **delete**). - Profile persistence *across* game sessions. ## License This project is **licensed** under the **MIT License** - see the [LICENSE.txt](https://github.com/femboypig/YellowKnife/LICENCE.txt) file for details. ## Credits Developed by [femboypig](https://github.com/femboypig).
